benefits.description: Most dense growth with Fin, RU and minox
Red light hat regrew what user wanted and provides ongoing insurance

side_effects.description: Negative effects on mood from Finasteride and Minoxidil
Negative effects on libido from Finasteride and Minoxidil
Negative effects on facial skin from Finasteride and Minoxidil

protocol_notes: User has done Fin, Min, RU, Taeian's protocol, and microneedling. Currently uses only red light hat. Runs testosterone and primo cycle once per year. Notes Finasteride and Minoxidil had deal-breaker side effects. Best balance was microneedling and Taeian's protocol.
